overall.description: A third-person perspective walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city waterfront at night. The character walks along a promenade with neon-lit skyscrapers on one side and water on the other, occasionally panning the camera to view the industrial skyline across the water. High-quality game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring ray-traced lighting and reflective wet surfaces.

large vertical digital advertisement screen on the side of a skyscraper
dense cluster of illuminated high-rise buildings with cyberpunk architecture
tall yellow lamppost with horizontal light fixture
dark water surface reflecting city lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet waterfront promenade at night in a futuristic city. The camera follows two pedestrians walking ahead along the concrete path, with neon-lit skyscrapers on the left and dark water on the right. Yellow street lamps line the walkway, and the distant skyline glows with blue and orange artificial light.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront overlook with industrial district view

events.description: camera pans right to face the water and industrial skyline across the bay

agents.ego_description: stopping forward progress to pan camera and observe the industrial buildings across the water

entered.detail: distant industrial complex with cooling towers and smokestacks silhouetted against the night sky
bright full moon visible in the dark sky above the industrial buildings
large hyperboloid cooling tower with red lights at the top
elevated industrial pipeline or bridge structure spanning across the view

segments.scene_description: The camera pans right to reveal a wide view of the water and an industrial district on the opposite shore. A full moon hangs in the sky above cooling towers and factory structures. The promenade walkway is now visible only at the left edge of the frame as the focus shifts to the industrial skyline and reflective water surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with palm trees and dense signage

events.description: camera pans left from waterfront view to face the commercial street and buildings

agents.ego_description: turning to survey the commercial street side with palm trees and passing vehicles

entered.detail: tall palm tree silhouetted against the building lights
multi-story commercial complex with illuminated windows and signage
dense collection of colorful neon signs and advertisements on building facades
multi-lane asphalt road with moving traffic and street markings

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left to face the commercial street side of the promenade, revealing palm trees, dense neon signage, and moving traffic. Modern glass and steel buildings tower overhead covered in illuminated advertisements. Vehicles drive along the multi-lane road while the waterfront drops out of view.

events.description: passing a large parked truck on the left side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade passing a large truck and approaching other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: large box truck parked on the side of the promenade path

entered.detail: green industrial box truck parked on the side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to facing forward along the promenade, passing a large parked truck on the left. The path continues toward the distant neon-lit skyline, with the water body reappearing on the right. The character walks steadily past the truck and continues following pedestrians ahead toward the glowing city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a futuristic waterfront that shifts from a quiet promenade to a panoramic view of the industrial coast and back into the neon-drenched city center. It begins by following pedestrians along a wet concrete path flanked by glowing skyscrapers and dark water under the light of yellow street lamps. As the camera pans right, the focus shifts away from the walkway to reveal a wide expanse of reflective water and a distant industrial district with cooling towers beneath a full moon. The scene then swings left to face the commercial side of the promenade, where the waterfront disappears behind a dense array of palm trees, towering glass buildings, and vibrant neon advertisements overlooking moving traffic. Finally, the camera returns to a forward-facing perspective, passing a large parked truck as it continues along the path toward the glowing city skyline.
